macro.title: US-Iran Conflict
macro.body: The ongoing US-Iran conflict continues to impact global markets, with potential for further escalation. This could lead to increased volatility in oil prices and the broader market. The conflict may also affect the global economy, particularly if it leads to a disruption in oil supplies.
macro.bull: A resolution to the conflict could lead to a rally in the market, benefiting the portfolio's leveraged ETFs.
macro.base: A continuation of the current situation, with periodic escalations and de-escalations, may lead to a neutral market impact.
macro.bear: A significant escalation of the conflict could lead to a market downturn, negatively impacting the portfolio.

macro.title: Global Economic Growth
macro.body: The global economy continues to grow, albeit at a slower pace. This growth may lead to increased demand for technology and financial services, benefiting the portfolio's holdings in these sectors.
macro.bull: A pickup in global economic growth could lead to a rally in the technology sector, benefiting the portfolio's holdings in NVDA, TXF.TO, and other tech stocks.
macro.base: A continuation of the current growth pace may lead to a neutral market impact.
macro.bear: A slowdown in global economic growth could lead to a downturn in the technology sector, negatively impacting the portfolio.

macro.title: Fed Policy
macro.body: The Federal Reserve's monetary policy continues to support the US economy, with potential for further rate cuts. This could lead to increased liquidity in the market, benefiting the portfolio's holdings.
macro.bull: A further rate cut by the Fed could lead to a rally in the market, benefiting the portfolio's leveraged ETFs.
macro.base: A continuation of the current monetary policy may lead to a neutral market impact.
macro.bear: A tightening of monetary policy could lead to a market downturn, negatively impacting the portfolio.

risks.title: 3x Leverage Amplification
risks.body: The portfolio's use of 3x leveraged ETFs amplifies both gains and losses, increasing the risk of significant declines in the event of a market downturn.

risks.title: FX Book Rate Drag
risks.body: The portfolio's significant USD exposure may lead to losses due to FX rate fluctuations, particularly if the CAD strengthens against the USD.

risks.title: Account Concentration
risks.body: The portfolio's concentration in a few key holdings may increase the risk of significant declines if any of these holdings experience a downturn.

news.headline: Broadcom Stock Slip
news.body: Broadcom's revenue miss may impact the portfolio's holding in AVGO, potentially leading to a decline in the stock's price.

outcomes.label: Bull
outcomes.scenario: The revenue miss is a one-time event, and AVGO's stock price recovers.

outcomes.label: Base
outcomes.scenario: The revenue miss leads to a neutral impact on AVGO's stock price.

outcomes.label: Bear
outcomes.scenario: The revenue miss leads to a decline in AVGO's stock price, negatively impacting the portfolio.

news.headline: NVIDIA AI Chip Demand
news.body: NVIDIA's strong AI chip demand may benefit the portfolio's holding in NVDA, potentially leading to an increase in the stock's price.

outcomes.label: Bull
outcomes.scenario: The strong demand leads to a significant increase in NVDA's stock price.

outcomes.label: Base
outcomes.scenario: The strong demand leads to a moderate increase in NVDA's stock price.

outcomes.label: Bear
outcomes.scenario: The strong demand is already priced into NVDA's stock price, leading to a neutral impact.

news.headline: Visa Stablecoin Platform
news.body: Visa's stablecoin platform may benefit the portfolio's holding in V, potentially leading to an increase in the stock's price.

outcomes.label: Bull
outcomes.scenario: The stablecoin platform leads to a significant increase in V's stock price.

outcomes.label: Base
outcomes.scenario: The stablecoin platform leads to a moderate increase in V's stock price.

outcomes.label: Bear
outcomes.scenario: The stablecoin platform has a neutral impact on V's stock price.

tfsa.text: The TFSA account is maxed out for 2026, and no new contributions can be made until 2027.
The TFSA account provides a tax-efficient way to invest, with no taxes owed on investment gains.

fhsa.text: The FHSA account is being used for a home purchase, and the funds will be withdrawn in 2027.
The FHSA account provides a tax-efficient way to save for a home purchase, with no taxes owed on investment gains.

rrsp.text: The RRSP account has a deduction limit of $20,000, and contributions can be made to reduce taxable income.
The RRSP account provides a tax-efficient way to invest, with taxes owed only when the funds are withdrawn.

investment.text: The non-registered account is subject to taxes on investment gains, and tax-loss harvesting can be used to minimize tax liabilities.
The non-registered account provides flexibility to invest in a variety of assets, including stocks, bonds, and ETFs.

daily_outlook: The portfolio's outlook for the day is neutral, with a focus on monitoring the market's reaction to the US-Iran conflict and the potential impact on the portfolio's holdings.
